articles.title: Person killed in Mattapan shooting, 2 others shot in Dorchester overnight Saturday
articles.description:
One man was killed in a Mattapan shooting, while two others were shot just hours later in a separate shooting in Dorchester, police said.

The post Person killed in Mattapan shooting, 2 others shot in Dorchester overnight Saturday appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: One man was killed in a shooting in Mattapan on Saturday night.
Two additional individuals were shot in Dorchester hours later, increasing local violence.
Residents are urged to remain vigilant as police investigate both incidents.

articles.title: Kevin Garnett wasn’t a fan of Jayson Tatum missing Game 7 vs. Sixers
articles.description:
"You’re about to go scrap and one of your best scrappers ain’t here. That’s a blow to the morale in here."

The post Kevin Garnett wasn’t a fan of Jayson Tatum missing Game 7 vs. Sixers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kevin Garnett criticized Jayson Tatum's absence in Game 7 against the Sixers.
Tatum's injury impacted team morale ahead of the crucial playoff game on May 10.
Boston Celtics face challenges in playoffs without key players like Tatum.

articles.title: Fleet season ends in Ottawa, as Charge’s Michela Cava scores double-OT winner to eliminate Boston in PWHL semifinals
articles.description:
“You’re left with this sort of empty feeling that we have right now,” coach Kris Sparre said. “We wanted more. We thought we were built for more.”

The post Fleet season ends in Ottawa, as Charge’s Michela Cava scores double-OT winner to eliminate Boston in PWHL semifinals appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston's PWHL team eliminated in semifinals by Ottawa Charge on May 10.
Michela Cava scored the double-overtime winner, ending Boston's playoff run.
Coach Kris Sparre expressed disappointment, highlighting unmet expectations for the season.

articles.title: 2 people wounded, 1 seriously, after shooting in Dorchester
articles.description:
A woman was transported to the hospital with serious life-threatening injuries, while a man was hospitalized with non-life threatening injuries.

The post 2 people wounded, 1 seriously, after shooting in Dorchester appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two individuals were shot in Dorchester on May 10, 2026.
A woman sustained life-threatening injuries; a man has non-life threatening injuries.
Local residents are concerned about rising violence in the neighborhood.

articles.title: 6 bodies found in a boxcar in Texas, officials say
articles.description:
The bodies were discovered in the city of Laredo. The circumstances of their deaths were not immediately known, the authorities said.

The post 6 bodies found in a boxcar in Texas, officials say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Six bodies were found in a boxcar in Laredo, Texas.
Authorities are investigating the circumstances of the deaths.
Boston residents may be concerned about migrant safety and border issues.

articles.title: NBA insider: Atlanta Hawks were interested in trade for Jaylen Brown last year
articles.description:
"That’s a team, given what happened this season, that I could see getting interested in Jaylen Brown."

The post NBA insider: Atlanta Hawks were interested in trade for Jaylen Brown last year appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Atlanta Hawks showed interest in trading for Jaylen Brown last season.
Insider suggests Hawks may pursue Brown again after Celtics' recent performance.
Potential trade could affect Celtics' roster and local fan engagement.

articles.title: Woman charged in Southborough fatal crash
articles.description:
Abigail Throckmorton, 23, faces a homicide charge in connection to a fatal crash on Turnpike Road in February, prosecutors said.

The post Woman charged in Southborough fatal crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abigail Throckmorton, 23, charged with homicide for February fatal crash in Southborough.
Crash occurred on Turnpike Road, resulting in significant community concern.
Local residents demand increased safety measures following the tragic incident.
